verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Tears that fell like rain Streamed down from my heart Colors turned to gray Emptiness led the way Until I fell apart You came to save me To show me that

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You're just a prayer away No matter where I am I know in my heart You're never too far When I'm losing my way You're just a prayer away My strength is in my faith I'm never alone, I'm never afraid Cause You're just a prayer away

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When I close my eyes Lord, I call Your name And the dark subsides Nothing can take the place Of the peace I find You came to save me To show me that

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Whenever I need to find You I just fall on my knees In You I find the strength That I need to live To believe
